//: Declaration-only build: emits types/ from the JSDoc in src/. Run via `npm run build:types`, which uses npx so this package never grows a node_modules (see AGENTS.md). `paths` resolves the @vue/reactivity peer to the sibling app's installed copy purely so reactive exports emit real types (Ref/ShallowRef) instead of `any` — nothing is installed or bundled from there.
